message:
Extract normalize_filter_paths for release/renew path validation

Add normalize_filter_paths(project_root, paths) that centralizes
path normalization for release and renew operations:
- Relativizes each input path against the project root
- Rejects absolute paths outside the project root with INVALID_PATH
- Rejects targeting the project root itself (empty relative path)

Both release_file_reservations() and renew_file_reservations() now
use the normalized paths throughout. Includes three unit tests for
relative/backslash normalization, out-of-root rejection, and
root-target rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
